records.cancellation_message: Anytime Cancellation: Cancel this booking for free up until the start time
records.pickup_instructions:
Pick Ups are at the Departures Level at each terminal (Hotel Courtesy Shuttle Bus Stop). On Call shuttles are available by request between 1:00 AM - 3:30 AM by calling the hotel directly when ready for pick up. 650-443-5500.

If you scanned your parking reservation to enter, you may scan it again when exiting. If you pulled a ticket to enter, please see a hotel staff member for validation & exit instructions.
records.dropoff_instructions:
If your parking pass says to scan it at the gate, please do. Otherwise, take a ticket at the gate to enter then go inside the hotel lobby to validate your reservation with a staff member.

After securing your vehicle & belongings, you may board the shuttle for a 5-minute drive to SFO.

fees.description: This fee helps us run our platform, as well as partner with more locations to provide a better parking experience.

validation_steps.instructions: If your parking pass says to scan it at the gate, please do. Otherwise, take a ticket at the gate to enter, then go inside the hotel lobby to validate your reservation with a staff member
You may park in any open space not marked as "Reserved"

After securing your vehicle and belongings, you may board the shuttle for a 5-minute drive to SFO. Pick-ups are at the Departures Level at each terminal (Hotel Courtesy Shuttle Bus Stop). On-call shuttles are available by request between 1:00 AM–3:30 AM by calling the hotel directly when ready for pick up: 650-443-5500.
If you scanned your parking reservation to enter, you may scan it again when exiting. If you pulled a ticket to enter, please see a hotel staff member for validation and exit instructions

If you scanned your parking reservation to enter, you may scan it again when exiting. If you pulled a ticket to enter, please see a hotel staff member for validation & exit instructions.
purchase_options.dropoff_instructions:
If your parking pass says to scan it at the gate, please do. Otherwise, take a ticket at the gate to enter then go inside the hotel lobby to validate your reservation with a staff member.

After securing your vehicle & belongings, you may board the shuttle for a 5-minute drive to SFO.

pw:venue.name: SFO Airport
pw:venue.description:
If you’re looking for the perfect San Francisco International Airport parking, you’re in luck. ParkWhiz has resources you need for booking and reserving SFO parking.

San Francisco International Airport (SFO) is the primary commercial airport for those flying into the San Francisco Bay Area. It is the second biggest airport in the state of California (after LAX) and ranks as the 10th busiest in America. More than 37 million passengers pass through San Francisco International every year. Travelers can reach major destinations in North America, Asia, Australia and other Pacific countries by flying with several major domestic and foreign airlines that currently serve the airport.

The San Francisco Airport Commission currently manages SFO, providing passengers with a number of amenities and services including San Francisco Airport parking. You can find parking at San Francisco Airport in 2 terminal garages for short-term parking and in the facility along South Airport Blvd. for long-term parking. Options include short-term garage, long-term covered, Valet, and Fast (reserved) parking. San Francisco Airport passengers can also park at privately-owned remote locations, such as the Park SFO Outdoor Parking lot on North Access Road.

Here is a short guide on how to get the San Francisco Airport parking that is best for your trip:

Compare SFO parking costs at various parking lots and garages. You will need to enter the date and time of your arrival and departure (at the facility) into the bar at the top of this page to calculate parking costs. As soon as you’ve done that, the results for calculated rates will be shown automatically. Compare and select the best option.

Choose the most convenient SFO parking site that offers the best rates. Just click the “book now” button for your chosen garage to display all the important information, including phone number, location, facility type, and more.

Reserve your parking space. After you’ve decided on a garage, don’t forget to place a reservation for your parking. You now have a reserved SFO parking space—way to go!

Haven't booked a flight yet? Then take a look at the links below to check out parking at other nearby airports.

Parking at other airports:

Oakland International Airport Parking Seattle–Tacoma International Airport Parking Los Angeles International Airport Parking San Diego International Airport Parking

records.cancellation_message: Anytime Cancellation: Cancel this booking for free up until the start time
records.pickup_instructions:
After retrieving your luggage, give us a call to arrange pickup.
From the baggage claim or departures level, follow signs for Hotel Shuttles.
Exit to the sidewalk and cross to the center island where shuttles pick up and drop off guests.
Look for the shuttle marked with SFO Marriott Waterfront and Hyatt logos.
(Available at Terminals 1, 2, 3, and International.)
Once back at the Marriott you may simply drive out when ready, by scanning your reservation code once more.
records.dropoff_instructions: Scan your reservation QR code at the entry kiosk to enter the lot. Proceed to the left (north) and park in any available, unreserved space. After securing your vehicle please visit the front lobby to arrange a shuttle.

fees.label: Service Fee
fees.description: This fee helps us run our platform, as well as partner with more locations to provide a better parking experience.

purchase_options.name: Self Uncovered

validation_steps.instructions: Scan your reservation QR code at the entry kiosk to enter the parking lot
You may park in any unreserved space in the lot
After returning to your vehicle, scan your reservation QR code at the exit kiosk to exit the parking
Overstaying your reservation time will result in additional charges due at exit, that are payable only by credit card (no cash).
The shuttle to the airport terminals runs 7 days per week, approximately every 15 minutes from 3:30am to midnight and every 30 minutes from midnight to 3:30am

cancellable_status.message: Anytime Cancellation: Cancel this booking for free up until the start time

disclaimers:
This is a self-park and lock facility, and parking is at your own risk. Parking does not include in-and-out privileges.

The shuttle to the airport terminals runs 7 days per week, approximately every 15 minutes from 3:30 am to midnight and every 30 minutes from midnight to 3:30 am.

**Oversized vehicles are not allowed**
purchase_options.pickup_instructions:
After retrieving your luggage, give us a call to arrange pickup.
From the baggage claim or departures level, follow signs for Hotel Shuttles.
Exit to the sidewalk and cross to the center island where shuttles pick up and drop off guests.
Look for the shuttle marked with SFO Marriott Waterfront and Hyatt logos.
(Available at Terminals 1, 2, 3, and International.)
Once back at the Marriott you may simply drive out when ready, by scanning your reservation code once more.
purchase_options.dropoff_instructions: Scan your reservation QR code at the entry kiosk to enter the lot. Proceed to the left (north) and park in any available, unreserved space. After securing your vehicle please visit the front lobby to arrange a shuttle.

records.location_name: Holiday Inn Express San Francisco-Airport South by IHG Lot
records.cancellation_message: Anytime Cancellation: Cancel this booking for free up until the start time
records.pickup_instructions:
Complimentary Shuttle operates:
5:00am - 10:50am
11:50am - 5:40pm
6:50pm - 12:40am 

Once you have collected your luggage, call the hotel at 650-347-2381 to request a shuttle.
Head to the Departures level and proceed to the "Hotel Shuttle" area.
Look for a black shuttle marked Crowne Plaza and Holiday Inn Express South.

IMPORTANT: Please ask the shuttle driver to confirm the shuttle is for Burlingame, as there is another Holiday Inn Express "North" shuttle in a different area.

When you return to your vehicle, you are all set to exit the lot. No checkout is required.
records.dropoff_instructions:
BEFORE LEAVING THE HOUSE: Ensure that you’ve stored your license plate to your reservation. We prefer that you PRINT your prepaid parking reservation for redemption.

Upon arrival please visit the front desk in the lobby. Present your printed or digital prepaid parking reservation. The front desk will provide a parking permit, which must be displayed in your vehicle for the duration of your stay. Park in any non-reserved space, ensure the permit is visible on your dash, then head to the front drive to catch the shuttle.

Complimentary Shuttle operates:
5:00am - 10:50am
11:50am - 5:40pm
6:50pm - 12:40am

fees.label: Service Fee
fees.description: This fee helps us run our platform, as well as partner with more locations to provide a better parking experience.

purchase_options.name: Self Uncovered

validation_steps.instructions: Upon arrival, show your printed parking pass at the front desk in the lobby for validation

cancellable_status.message: Anytime Cancellation: Cancel this booking for free up until the start time

disclaimers:
Shuttle runs from and to the airport every 35 - 45 minutes from 5:00 a.m. to 10:50 a.m., 11:50 a.m to 5:40 p.m., and 6:50 p.m. to 12:40 a.m.


 Shuttle phone number (650) 347-2381

Look for a black shuttle marked Crowne Plaza and Holiday Inn Express South.

IMPORTANT: Please ask the shuttle driver to confirm the shuttle is for Burlingame, as there is another Holiday Inn Express "North" shuttle in a different area.

When you return to your vehicle, you are all set to exit the lot. No checkout is required.

Exit the terminal and cross the street to middle island for Airport shuttle pickup

records.location_name: Sonesta Select San Francisco Airport Oyster Point Lot
records.cancellation_message: Anytime Cancellation: Cancel this booking for free up until the start time
records.pickup_instructions:
- After gathering your luggage head to the departures floor, and head to the “Hotel Shuttles” area
- Note: At the international terminal, follow signs to the departures floor, exit the building and head to “Zone 12” and “Hotel Courtesy Shuttles”
- The shuttle runs on a loop, so no need to call the front desk, but if you would like to inquire about timing you may call the front desk.
- Make sure you boarding a white shuttle that says “Sonesta Select” & Doubletree & “Travelodge” DO NOT board the shuttle “Sonesta ES Suites”
records.dropoff_instructions:
- Pull up in front of the hotel.
- Show your digital or printed parking pass to the front desk to validate your parking.
- The front desk will provide you with a parking pass which you must place on your car dashboard.
- Front desk staff will direct you to the designated parking area
- Board the shuttle to the airport.

fees.label: Service Fee
fees.description: This fee helps us run our platform, as well as partner with more locations to provide a better parking experience.

purchase_options.name: Self Uncovered

validation_steps.instructions: Show the hotel front desk your parking reservation.
Receive a validation code.
Scan the QR code at the front desk to register your vehicle (all vehicles must be properly registered).
Park in any spot that is not marked reserved.

cancellable_status.message: Anytime Cancellation: Cancel this booking for free up until the start time

disclaimers:
Shuttle runs from and to the airport every 15 minutes. Shuttle phone number 	(650) 871-4100. 

**DO NOT board the shuttle Sonesta ES Suites.**

You can find parking at San Francisco Airport in 2 terminal garages for short-term parking and in the facility along South Airport Blvd. for long-term parking. Options include short-term garage, long-term covered, Valet, and Fast (reserved) parking. San Francisco Airport passengers can also park at privately-owned remote locations, such as the Park SFO Outdoor Parking lot on North Access Road.

Here is a short guide on how to get the San Francisco Airport parking that is best for your trip:

Compare SFO parking costs at various parking lots and garages. You will need to enter the date and time of your arrival and departure (at the facility) into the bar at the top of this page to calculate parking costs. As soon as you’ve done that, the results for calculated rates will be shown automatically. Compare and select the best option.

Choose the most convenient SFO parking site that offers the best rates. Just click the “book now” button for your chosen garage to display all the important information, including phone number, location, facility type, and more.

Reserve your parking space. After you’ve decided on a garage, don’t forget to place a reservation for your parking. You now have a reserved SFO parking space—way to go!

Haven't booked a flight yet? Then take a look at the links below to check out parking at other nearby airports.
